task_completion.description: Navigate to the Contacts module Layout Editor in Vtiger CRM settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the Vtiger CRM settings interface, specifically the 'Module Layouts & Fields' or 'Layout Editor' page with 'Contacts' selected as the target module.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Title' field to be visible in the Key Field View (Summary View).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Contacts Layout Editor, the 'Title' field block shows the Key Field View indicator enabled (typically a highlighted star/key icon, or a checked box in the field's edit properties).

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Mobile Phone' field to be visible in the Key Field View (Summary View).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Contacts Layout Editor, the 'Mobile Phone' field block shows the Key Field View indicator enabled.

task_completion.description: Configure the 'Department' field to be visible in the Key Field View (Summary View).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Contacts Layout Editor, the 'Department' field block shows the Key Field View indicator enabled.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Primary Email' field as a mandatory requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Contacts Layout Editor, the 'Primary Email' field shows the Mandatory indicator enabled (typically an asterisk '*' next to the field name, or a checked 'Mandatory Field' box in its edit properties).

integrity.description: The agent used the Vtiger CRM web GUI to make changes rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser and Vtiger CRM interface. No terminal windows executing MySQL commands or database scripts should be visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Vtiger CRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard Vtiger CRM layout editor. The agent is not editing source code files or using a text editor to mock the changes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state of the layout editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open and being used to manually add asterisks or active classes to the field icons.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task targets the 'Contacts' module layout. The fields that must be set as key/summary fields are 'Title' (database field: title), 'Mobile Phone' (database field: mobile), and 'Department' (database field: department). The field that must be made mandatory is 'Primary Email' (database field: email). Look for visual indicators like stars/keys for summary fields and asterisks for mandatory fields in the Vtiger Layout Editor.
